title: 🏷️ MAGAZINE ISSUE
data_structure:
\[
  {
    "name": "title",
    "mandatory": true,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "Sieger-Typen"
  },
  {
    "name": "consecutive\_number",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "number",
    "example": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "issue\_number",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "number",
    "example": "11"
  },
  {
    "name": "issue\_year",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "number",
    "example": "2025"
  },
  {
    "name": "release\_date",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "2025-10-01"
  },
  {
    "name": "single\_copy\_price",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "number",
    "example": "5.4"
  },
  {
    "name": "single\_copy\_price\_unit",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "€"
  },
  {
    "name": "pages",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "number",
    "example": "148"
  }
]
